titleStmt.title: SII 31.116: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 116. (A.R. No. B 243 of 1938.) KŌḌŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the temple of Chennakēśava svāmi.
It is dated in Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Pushya ba. 12, Corresponding to December 28, Monday, 1556 A.D.

It registers the gift of land by Chennaya, the son of Timmaya to the god Chennakēśavamūrthi of AṁdirājuKōḍūru situated in Gaṇḍikōta-sīma. Gaṇdikōtasīma, where the gift village situated was given as amaranāyaṁkara by the king to mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Timmayadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrījayābhyu
daya śālivāhasa śakavarṣa
bulu 1478 Agunēṭi naḷa saṁ
ṁvatsara puṣyaba 12lu śrīma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadā
sivadēvarāya mahārāya
lu vidyāsagaramaṁdu pṛdhvisā
mrājyaṁ śeI(cēyu)cuṁḍaṁgānu śrī
manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁ
dēla timmayadēva mahārāju
luṁgāriki Amaranāyaṁkarānaku
pāliṁcci yiyyanavadhariṁccina ghaṁ
ḍikōṭa śīmalōnu Aṁdirāju
kōḍūranu dēvadēvōttamulu
Ayina Akhilā
ṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁ
ḍanāyakula
yina kōḍū
ri śrīcennakēśava
mūrttiki timma
rāju pinatimmaya
kumāruṁḍu nārapa Anaṁtamulu
Ayina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁcina
bhūdāna kaṁmmadhamaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
